Pages.Title: Golemancy
Pages.Text:
With so much to explore in the world of Orbis, automation of mundane tasks might be exactly what you need.

While the golem body is worth as much as a statue, Essence of Life can be used to build a will. The art of golemancy is about connecting the mind and body to create helpful golems.

Note: While golems can work, these little beings can only do as much as the will allows.
